title: coleus suffruticosus
intro: Coleus suffruticosus, also known as Dwarf Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The leaves of Coleus suffruticosus have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are taken internally to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
